raw.script_eng:
Duda: Welcome everyone to the CONCACAF Nations League Finals at Sofi Stadium, intro today's game, THIRD PLACE MATCH… It's gonna be a party and I am not alone. Intro Ili. 
Ili: Bienvenidos a los juegos finales de CONCACAF Nations League en SoFi Stadium! El primer partido para el tercer lugar sera entre Canada y Estados Unidos. Esto va a ser una fiesta y estamos listos para vivirla. 
Duda: That's right Ili, but we need some moves, we need some energy and becaue of that, ladies and gentlemen let me introduce you to the life of the party, the Mister Zoom Zoom! 
Najja: Najja introduces himself and Grayson 
Duda: wraps it up

As we countdown to the 2026 FIFA World Cup, the Los Angeles World Cup Host Committee is proud to unveil the Official Los Angeles poster.
The poster will be prominently featured around the region leading up to the U.S. Men’s National Team Opening Match - right here at SoFi Stadium. 
To learn more about Los Angeles as a FIFA World Cup Host City visit 
Los Angeles FWC 26 Dot Com

raw.script_eng:
Welcome - let's get the party started. Track: Let's get started!!

Camera 1: Duda & Iliana 
Duda: Introduce yourself : Welcome to Concacaf Nations League Finals. My name is Duda Pavao and I'm one of your hosts for today's matches.  We have MEXICO against PANAMA at 6:30, fighting for a the Finals. I brought some extra help to get this party going, first,  Iliana Jimenez.
Iliana: Hola y bienvenidos a la final del CONCACAF Nations League. Mi nombre es Iliana Jimenez y soy su otra de sus anfitrionas esta noche. Tenemos a Mexico contra Panama a las 6:30 luchando por el oro! Duda, who else is joining us today?
Duda:  Intro Najjah => Najjah intro himself. => Najjah: We will need good music for this party and I brought my favorite DJ in the world: Grayson Repp. Grayson, should we get Started?
Grayson: Drop the beat.
<all dancing on cam for a couple seconds>
Duda: That's right CONCACAF fans, the party is just getting started! We're gonna bring the energy and fun today so LA, we need YOU to be ready for us? Right, Illiana? 
Illiana: That's right, Duda... Fans de CONCACAF, la fiesta apenas esta comenzando y queremos que ustedes nos demuestren la energia y carisma que tiene Los Angeles.
Duda: so stay hyped, and every time you see a camera, bring that energy! Deal?

rows.cue:
1hr to KO

- Duda: "SOFI Stadium"
- Grayson: "It’s the Nations League Finals"
- Iliana: "Mexico vs Panama"
- Najjah: "We are 1 hr to Kick-off"

raw.activity:

raw.script_eng:
Sofi stadium... it's almost time for the moment that you have been waiting for. Guess what time is it? It's... oh no, I forgot my watch. Illiana, help.
Illiana: SoFi Stadium! Ya casi es la hora que todos estan esperando, pero... no puede ser, Duda yo tambien no olvide mi reloj! Pero ya se! Busquemos a Najjah! 
Duda: Yes! We need to find Najjah! 
Both: Najjah! Najjah!
Najjah arrives saving the day: what's going on girls? 
Duda: help Najjah, it's almost gametime!! What time is it?
Iliana: Si Najjah, que hora es? 
Najjah: ...... It's ONE HOUR 
All: TO KICKOFF.
